canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset used to assess the harmfulness of LLMs, containing questions across 11 harmful categories derived from Meta's and OpenAI's usage policies.
papers: BackdoorAlign: Mitigating Fine-tuning based Jailbreak Attack with Backdoor Enhanced Safety Alignment
